domanda: Which adaptation cannot help increase the speed of transmission in a motor neurone?
D: Presence of an insulating myelin sheath
spiegazione: A synapse is a junction between cells and introduces delay rather than increasing conduction speed along a motor neurone. Nodes of Ranvier, myelin and larger axon diameter all help speed conduction.

domanda: In cells of winter wheat, membrane fluidity changes as temperature falls. Which type of bond would become more common in membrane lipids as conditions become colder?
spiegazione: At lower temperatures membranes maintain fluidity by increasing unsaturated fatty acids. Unsaturation introduces carbon-carbon double bonds, written as C=C.

domanda: Which of the following can produce vesicles?
spiegazione: The rough endoplasmic reticulum, Golgi apparatus and cell surface membrane can all bud off vesicles under appropriate conditions.

domanda: Which property of water is most important when heat is lost from human skin?
B: dipole properties so salts can dissolve in sweat
spiegazione: Evaporation of sweat removes heat efficiently because water has a high latent heat of vaporisation.

domanda: In a prokaryote, transcription can occur in which of the following?
spiegazione: Prokaryotes have no nucleus, so transcription occurs in the cytoplasm. It does not occur in mitochondria, and ribosomes are the site of translation, not transcription.

domanda: During which stage of the menstrual cycle is oestrogen falling, luteinising hormone and follicle-stimulating hormone maximal, and progesterone rising?
B: Between the end of menstruation and four days before ovulation
C: After ovulation but before the start of menstruation
E: Four days before ovulation and the time of ovulation
spiegazione: LH and FSH peak around ovulation. At that point oestrogen falls after its pre-ovulatory peak and progesterone begins to rise.

domanda: Place the following structures in a human sperm cell in descending order of size: 1. mitochondrion 2. nucleus 3. ribosome
spiegazione: The nucleus is the largest structure, mitochondria are smaller, and ribosomes are much smaller still.

domanda: Which one of the following is NOT a carbohydrate?
spiegazione: Glucagon is a peptide hormone. The other options are carbohydrates: disaccharides, monosaccharides or polysaccharides.

domanda: A short section of DNA that codes for a protein has the sequence CATTGGGCATCG. Which statements are correct? 1. There are a total of 29 hydrogen bonds between this section and its complementary strand. 2. There are 12 phosphodiester bonds present within this section of DNA. 3. The unmutated tRNA molecules used to translate this sequence contain a total of 3 uracil bases.
spiegazione: The sequence has 7 A/T pairs and 5 G/C pairs, giving 31 hydrogen bonds, so statement 1 is false. Statement 2 is false as a double-stranded section contains more than 12 phosphodiester bonds. Statement 3 is the only correct one.
